projects.name: Hotel Reservation System
projects.description:
Developed a hotel reservation system with admin and kiosk interfaces using JavaFX (FXML)
•
Applied MVC architecture with DAO/service layers and SQLite for persistent
storage
•
Implemented booking, guest management, billing, feedback, logging, and
validation

projects.name: Fragments API (Cloud Microservice)
projects.description:
Built and deployed a RESTful microservice for managing multimedia fragments
with full CRUD support
•
Used DynamoDB (metadata) and S3 (storage) with Dockerized deployment on
AWS ECS
•
Implemented CI/CD with GitHub Actions and secure authentication (Basic Auth &
Cognito JWT)
•
Developed a React UI with real-time format conversion (Markdown, images,
JSON)
